name: Mashed Potato Salad 2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Miracle Whip salad dressing (1 to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into chunks.
2. Cook the potato chunks, covered with water, until tender.
3. Mash the cooked potatoes thoroughly.
4. Add salt, pepper, butter, and about 1 cup of Miracle Whip salad dressing. Beat together until creamy and free of lumps.
5. Add celery, onions, sweet pickles, and hard-boiled eggs. Mix well.
6. If desired, add additional salad dressing or mustard.
7. Place fresh garden lettuce around the edge of a serving bowl.
8. Spoon the potato salad mixture into the bowl.
